item.title: uni-ball Jetstream RT Pens
item.description:
uni-ball Jetstream RT Pens admin Mon, 16 Feb 2026 - 17:53

The uni-ball Jetstream RT Pens are a popular choice for office and school supplies, known for their smooth writing experience and quick-drying ink. These pens feature a hybrid ink formula that combines the best qualities of gel and ballpoint inks, providing vibrant colors and a consistent flow. The RT model typically includes a retractable design for convenience and a comfortable grip for extended writing sessions. They are available in various colors and tip sizes, making them versatile for different writing tasks.

Remote video URL
Author Name
NYT Wirecutter
Thumbnail local URI
public://oembed_thumbnails/2026-02/uGX-70uLULWBCcDs5hvwcOVQEHcsJrKgy2qHo3GsEXM.jpg
Resource Title
The Best Ballpoint Pen
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: uni Mitsubishi Pencil Jetstream Lite Touch Ink Pen
item.description:
uni Mitsubishi Pencil Jetstream Lite Touch Ink Pen admin Mon, 16 Feb 2026 - 17:03

The Stationery uni Mitsubishi Pencil Jetstream Lite Touch Ink Pen is designed for smooth writing and features a unique hybrid ink that combines the best qualities of gel and ballpoint inks. It offers a comfortable grip, quick-drying properties, and a fine tip for precision. This pen is ideal for everyday use, whether for note-taking, journaling, or professional tasks. Its sleek design and reliable performance make it a popular choice among students and professionals alike.

Author Name
bungu

item.title: Black+Blum - Water Bottle - Stainless Steel Thermal
item.description:
Black+Blum - Water Bottle - Stainless Steel Thermal admin Wed, 29 Oct 2025 - 23:42

This water bottle features a stainless steel lid so your water never touches plastic, except for a tiny, BPA free food-grade silicone seal to guarantee it's 100% leakproof.

Unlike most bottles, even expensive brands like YETI, this one ditches the plastic lid for a truly clean drinking experience.

Zero plastic, zero chemicals. No paint, ink, or coatings—just pure water.

Only available in 25 fl oz

  • Glass is non-porous, ensuring pure taste and zero staining or ghosting from coffee, tea, or juice
  • Glass is dishwasher safe and you can see if it's clean inside
item.dc:creator: admin

item.title: YouTube videos on self sustainable living in the city
item.description:
YouTube videos on self sustainable living in the city admin Wed, 8 Oct 2025 - 23:06

Urban living often comes with the challenge of limited space, but innovative YouTube creators are showing that this is no barrier to achieving a more self-sufficient lifestyle. Moving beyond traditional soil-based methods, a growing number of channels focus on advanced, hyper-efficient growing techniques like hydroponics and aquaponics. These videos demonstrate how to create lush, productive gardens in apartments, balconies, and even indoors. From building your first small-scale system to understanding the symbiotic relationships that make these systems thrive, this corner of YouTube proves that the dream of "city homesteading" is not only possible, but highly accessible and rewarding.
item.dc:creator: admin
